data.body: Add regression coverage proving the default shipped workflow is Loom-backed, claim output is rendered from Loom-defined prompts, profile-specific output expectations change the rendered prompt, and multiple installed workflows still work. Tests should fail if a workflow action falls back to static non-Loom prompts or if profile/workflow output semantics stop reaching the rendered claim prompt.
data.title: Add end-to-end tests for Loom-backed prompt resolution
